{{Quote|Hunnos' brother, Fenrol, was killed in a speeder crash shortly before Hunnos escaped.|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Sundria Khartoor|Khartoor]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FaEM" />}}
'''Fenrol Jarkey''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] resident of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Fenrol Jarkey wanted to smuggle some spice into Theed, and I was going to help him sell it. But now he's dead, the stupid drunk.|[[Derm Worrit]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:FaEM" />}}
[[File:Crash_site.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Crash site of Fenrol Jarkey]]
Fenrol Jarkey was the son of [[Ados Jarkey]] and the brother of the murderer [[Hunnos Jarkey]]. At some point after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he planned to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] with [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire|Borvo's thug]] [[Derm Worrit]].<ref name="SWG:FaEM" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> Fenrol was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bike]] accident some [[Time/Legends|time]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], when his [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] crashed into a [[Tree/Legends|tree]] at the edge of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] and caught [[Fire/Legends|fire]]. When agents of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] arrived to investigate the scene of the crash, all they found were the scorched remains of Fenrol, his flesh completely burned away.<ref name="SWG:FaEM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fenrol Jarkey appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:FaEM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Fenrol Jarkey was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
